# External reference — everything-claude-code

Upstream: https://github.com/affaan-m/everything-claude-code

Use as an optional external reference/plugin for Claude Code skills, agents, hooks, commands, and security tooling.

## Policy

- Do not vendor the upstream repo by default.
- If copying files, preserve upstream license notices.
- Prefer documenting selected skills/commands and install instructions.
- Keep local project-specific skills higher priority than external generic skills.

## Suggested selected categories

- TDD workflow
- security review
- AgentShield/secrets scanning
- API design
- frontend patterns
- E2E testing
- deep research
- quality gate
